voice_design_desc: Design unique voices through natural language descriptions
prompt_continue_desc: Continue generating speech from a prompt audio's style
voice_clone_desc: Lightweight voice cloning, suitable for quick testing and simple scenarios.
ultimate_clone_desc: Advanced voice cloning with complete parameter control and fine-tuning capabilities.
script_desc: Multi-role dialogue synthesis with emotion control
help_about_subtitle: Multi-model TTS synthesis platform with unified UI
help_about_desc: TTS MultiModel is a comprehensive text-to-speech synthesis platform that integrates multiple TTS models with a unified and beautiful user interface. It supports voice design, voice cloning, emotion control, and duration control features.
help_voxcpm2_desc: VoxCPM2 is a powerful text-to-speech model that supports multi-language synthesis, voice cloning, and LoRA fine-tuning. It provides high-quality voice synthesis with natural and expressive output.
help_voxcpm2_feature1: Multi-language support (Chinese, English, Japanese, Korean, etc.)
help_voxcpm2_feature2: Voice design with natural language description
help_voxcpm2_feature3: Zero-shot voice cloning with reference audio
help_voxcpm2_feature4: LoRA fine-tuning for custom voice training
help_voxcpm2_feature5: Advanced parameter control (CFG, steps, noise reduction)
help_indextts2_desc: Industrial-grade zero-shot TTS with emotion and duration control.
help_faq_a4: VoxCPM2 is suitable for general voice synthesis and cloning. IndexTTS 2.0 is ideal for scenarios requiring emotion control and precise duration control.
help_copyright_desc: This project is open source under the MIT License.
help_copyright_license: MIT License - Permission is hereby granted, free of charge, to any person obtaining a copy of this software and associated documentation files.
indextts2_clone_desc: Zero-shot voice cloning. Upload a reference audio to clone the voice.
indextts2_emotion_desc: Control speech emotion with three modes
upload_emotion_ref_desc: Upload emotion reference audio (for emotion style extraction)
emotion_text_input_placeholder: Describe the emotion you want in natural language...
quick_desc_4: A bit fearful yet somewhat happy
indextts2_duration_desc: Precisely control the duration of generated audio
duration_free_desc: Model auto-generates, faithfully reproducing prosodic features
duration_specified_desc: Precisely control duration by adjusting token count
help_gpu_desc: TTS MultiModel supports multiple GPU backends for optimal performance.
help_nvidia_desc: NVIDIA GPUs use CUDA backend for maximum performance.
help_amd_desc: AMD GPUs use ROCm backend for high performance computing.
help_intel_desc: Intel GPUs and iGPUs use XPU backend via IPEX.
help_apple_desc: Apple Silicon uses MPS (Metal Performance Shaders) backend.
help_cpu_desc: CPU mode works without GPU, but is slower.
help_indextts2_feature1_desc: Precise control of audio duration (0.5x-1.5x speed)
help_indextts2_feature2_desc: Three emotion control modes (same prompt, different prompt, text description)
help_indextts2_feature3_desc: Clone voice with just 5-30 seconds reference audio
help_faq_a1: If using CPU mode, generation will be significantly slower. Please use GPU mode for optimal performance.
help_faq_a2: Reference audio supports WAV, MP3, FLAC, and OGG formats.
help_faq_q3: How to improve voice cloning quality?
help_faq_a3: Use high-quality reference audio (clear voice, no noise), 5-30 seconds in length.
seed_info: 0 for random, other values are fixed seeds
script_example: Each line starts with [Character], followed by dialogue
records_auto_show: History will appear here after synthesis
clone_to_create: Create your own voice through voice cloning
click_to_select: Click table row to select voice
delete_confirm_msg: Are you sure you want to delete voice
audio_not_exist: Audio file does not exist or cannot be played
default_voice_design_text: Hello, this is a voice design test.
voice_desc_placeholder: e.g., Extremely sweet loli voice with nasal tone
default_clone_text: Hello, this is my cloned voice.
instruction_placeholder: e.g., Slightly faster, gentle tone, a bit playful
cfg_tooltip: Classifier Free Guidance - higher = more consistent with description
steps_tooltip: More steps = better quality but slower
denoise_tooltip: Remove background noise from reference audio
seed_tooltip: 0 for random, other values for reproducible results
tooltip_cfg: Classifier Free Guidance strength. Higher values follow instructions more closely. Range: 0.1-10, default: 2.0
tooltip_steps: Inference steps. More steps = better quality but slower. Range: 1-30, default: 10
tooltip_denoise: Denoise processing. Removes background noise from reference audio
tooltip_normalize: Text normalization. Converts numbers, abbreviations, etc. to spoken form
tooltip_seed: Random seed. 0 for random, other values reproduce same results
example_line1: [Narrator] In a quiet café, two people meet again after years apart.
example_line3: [Xiao Hong] (smiling) I promised I'd come back.
name: Name
select_lora_first: Please select a LoRA model first
save_voice_hint: Save current result as a voice
help_step_vd1: Enter the text you want to synthesize in the input box
help_step_vd3: Describe voice characteristics in the voice description (e.g., extremely sweet loli voice)
help_step_vd5: After generation, save as a custom voice
help_step_vc1: Enter the text you want to synthesize
help_step_vc2: Select a saved voice, or upload a new reference audio
help_step_vc3: Click Start Cloning to begin synthesis
help_step_vc4: Reference audio recommended: 10-60 seconds, clear without background noise
help_step_vc5: Expand Advanced Parameters to adjust CFG value, inference steps, etc.
help_step_uc1: Enter the text you want to synthesize
help_step_uc2: Upload reference audio (10-60 seconds, clear without background noise)
help_step_uc4: Expand Advanced Parameters to adjust CFG value, inference steps, denoise strength, random seed
help_step_uc5: Click Ultimate Clone Generate to start synthesis
help_step_s1: View engine version and model path info
help_gpu_note1: AMD ROCM support for integrated GPUs (iGPU/APU) may be limited - some APUs may require additional configuration
help_gpu_note2: Intel integrated GPUs share system memory - ensure at least 16GB system RAM for VoxCPM2 (requires ~6.5GB VRAM)
help_gpu_note3: NVIDIA GPUs are fully supported with optimal performance and stability
help_gpu_note4: For AMD ROCM: Install ROCM version of PyTorch. For Intel XPU: Install intel-extension-for-pytorch
download_guide_title: TTS MultiModel Pro - Model Download Guide
download_guide_welcome: Welcome to TTS MultiModel Pro v{{ version }}
download_guide_notice: Some model files are not yet downloaded. Please complete the model download before using voice synthesis.
download_guide_step1: Open Terminal/CMD and navigate to the project directory
download_guide_step2: Run the following command to start downloading
download_guide_step3: Wait for all models to finish downloading
download_guide_step4: Restart this application to enter the main interface
download_guide_note: Model files are stored in the models/ directory and can be used directly after download.
indextts2_desc: Industrial-grade zero-shot TTS with emotion and duration control
indextts2_default_text: Hello, this is IndexTTS 2.0 voice synthesis test.
emotion_text_placeholder: e.g., In a very happy tone
voice_desc_format: The more specific the description, the more accurate the voice. Recommended format: [Age] + [Personality] + [Scene] + [Tone]
voice_desc_example: Example: 18-year-old girl, lively and energetic, live streaming, slightly fast pace with a smile
network_disconnected: Network disconnected, please check your connection
oom_solution: Insufficient VRAM. Try shortening the text, closing other GPU programs, or switching to CPU mode in settings
no_persona_hint: Please clone or design a voice first
name_exists: This name already exists, please use a different name
onboard_steps: 1. Enter text → 2. Select voice → 3. Click generate
file_not_found: Audio file not found or deleted
request_timeout: Request timeout, please try again later
connection_error: Network connection error, please check your network
default_sample_rate_hint: Defines the sample rate of the output audio in Hertz. 24000Hz is the standard sample rate for most TTS models.
default_speed_hint: Controls the default speed multiplier for speech output. 1.0 is normal speed, 0.5 is half speed, 2.0 is double speed.
default_seed_hint: Controls the randomness of speech generation. The same seed value with the same input will produce identical output.
script_studio_silence_secs_hint: Controls the silence duration between multi-character dialogue segments in Script Studio.
retry_badcase_hint: Auto-retry for failed cases. When enabled, failed audio generations will be automatically retried.
retry_max_times_hint: Maximum number of retries for failed cases. No more retries after exceeding this limit.
retry_ratio_threshold_hint: Retry duration ratio threshold. Triggers retry when the audio duration to text length ratio exceeds this value.
target_lufs_hint: Target loudness value in LUFS. Controls the overall loudness level of the output audio. -16 LUFS is the podcast standard.
idle_timeout_hint: Server idle timeout in seconds. GPU resources will be automatically released after this period of inactivity.
trim_silence_hint: Auto-trim silence from audio start and end. When enabled, blank silence segments at the beginning and end will be removed.
auto_save_hint: Automatically save audio files locally after generation. No need to manually download when enabled.
auto_play_hint: Automatically play audio after generation. Audio will start playing immediately when generation is complete.
notifications_hint: Show desktop notifications for operation success or failure. Displays prompt messages in the browser when enabled.
